text: Oak Ridge pet policy: cats and dogs are welcome. There is a one-time $300 pet deposit and $25/month pet rent. Breed restrictions apply; two pets maximum per home.
Oak Ridge amenities: a 24/7 fitness center with Peloton bikes, a resort-style pool, a co-working lounge, and a dog park. Covered garage parking is available.
Oak Ridge application: apply online with a $50 application fee per adult. Approval typically takes 1-2 business days. Income requirement is 3x the monthly rent; co-signers accepted.
Oak Ridge tours: self-guided and agent-led tours are available 9am-6pm Monday through Saturday. Virtual tours can be scheduled on request. Bring a photo ID for in-person visits.
Oak Ridge market-rate pricing: studios from $1,295, one-bedrooms from $1,550, two-bedrooms from $1,995. Pricing varies by floor plan and lease term. Ask about current availability.

Oak Ridge affordable (LIHTC) program: residents must complete an annual income recertification to maintain eligibility. Bring current income and asset documentation. This is a compliance requirement, not a marketing offer.
Summit Residential pet policy: pet-friendly with no breed restrictions. $400 refundable pet deposit. On-site dog washing station and a fenced bark park.
Summit Heights amenities: rooftop sky lounge, infinity pool, smart-home thermostats, package lockers, and an EV charging garage. Amenity-forward, modern finishes throughout.
Summit Residential application: fully online, $40 application fee, instant background screening. Income requirement is 2.5x monthly rent. Guarantor program available for students.
Summit Heights tours: book a guided tour any day 10am-7pm, or take a 3D virtual tour online. Same-day tours are often available for nearby move-in dates.
